column1: I absolutely love this phone, the battery lasts all day!
Worst customer service ever, I waited two hours and got nothing.
The package arrived on time and contained the items listed.
Fantastic movie, the acting was brilliant and the plot gripping.
This product broke after a week, total waste of money.
It is an average laptop, nothing special but it works.
Highly recommend this restaurant, the food was delicious.
The hotel room was dirty and the staff were rude.
The meeting has been rescheduled to next Monday.
Amazing experience, I will definitely come back again!
